channel.title: ShovelsSale.com — The Shovels Chronicles
channel.description: Pick-and-shovel strategy for the AI era. Weekly insights for those who sell shovels while the world mines for gold.

item.title: Why Pick-and-Shovel Wins in 2026
item.dc:creator: ShovelsSale.com
item.description: Every gold rush has two kinds of players. Here is why the shovel sellers always win — and what that means for AI in 2026.
item.content:encoded:
In every gold rush in history, the vast majority of miners walked away with nothing.

The ones who built lasting wealth were those who supplied the rush — not joined it.

The pick-and-shovel strategy says: don't bet on which model wins. Build the infrastructure every model needs.

Read the full article →

item.title: Top AI Infrastructure Plays Right Now
item.dc:creator: ShovelsSale.com
item.description: The undervalued picks and shovels of the AI boom that most people are ignoring while chasing flashy model names.
item.content:encoded:
Everyone is watching the AI models. Nobody is watching the companies that make them possible.

That is the opportunity.

Read the full article →
